name: Pack Of 12: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Beef & Liver Chunks in Gravy 400g

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food

shortDescription: Give your cat superior nourishment with Reflex Plus Beef & Liver Wet Food — a protein-packed, expertly formulated meal promoting energy, digestive balance, and optimal wellbeing.
description: Reflex Plus Beef & Liver Adult Cat Canned Food (Pack of 12) , fully-balanced, beef & liver protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 7.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) -?81 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) -?1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -?180 IE/kg Iron -?8 mg/kg Copper -?1.2 mg/kg Iodine -?0.21 mg/kg Manganese -?1.6 mg/kg Zinc -?8.0 mg/kg Selenium -?0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Beef 4% min, liver 4% min), Cereals, Fish & Fish Derivatives, Minerals, Preservatives, Colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serve 2 meals. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
